quiz.question: When was the first event related to civil unrest mentioned in the narrative
quiz.questionCaption: Civil Unrest : dissatisfaction among the general population as evidenced by rallies, strikes, demonstrations or sabotage.

quiz.question: Based on the narrative, match each topic with one of its most prominent time periods.
quiz.questionCaption: Civil unrest: Dissatisfaction among the general population as evidenced by rallies, strikes, demonstrations or sabotage. War: A formal declaration of hostilities by one country against another.

quiz.questionCaption: War: A formal declaration of hostilities by one country against another. Armed conflict: Disputes between opposing groups involving the use of weaponry, but not formally declared a war.
